$comment: Anti-self-referential provenance manifest for quantvolt's built-in commodity registry (src/quantvolt/models/commodity.py:BUILT_IN_COMMODITIES). Every commodity_id there MUST have a matching entry here with the SAME price_unit and exchange, plus either a verbatim external citation (`source`) or a `citation_status: "pending-verbatim"` marker that is also listed in `pending` below. Enforced mechanically by scripts/ci/check_provenance.py and tests/unit/test_conventions_manifest.py -- see .kiro/steering/provenance.md. Appending a new commodity (e.g. THE, PEG, ZTP, PSV) is a single new key in `commodities` plus, if not yet fully cited, one entry in `pending`.

source.quote: The contract price is in Euros and Euro cents per MWh
The contract price is in Sterling and pence per therm.
source.note: Unit of trading: 1,000 therms of natural gas per day (1 therm = 29.3071 kilowatt hours)

source.quote: The contract price is in Euros and Euro cents per MWh
source.note: German THE Natural Gas Futures, ICE Endex. Unit of trading: 1 MW; minimum fluctuation: 0.5 Euro Cent per MWh (€ 0.005/MWh).

source.quote: The contract price is in Euros and Euro cents per MWh
source.note: French PEG Natural Gas Futures, ICE Endex. Unit of trading: 1 MWh/day; minimum fluctuation: 0.5 Euro Cent per MWh (€0.005/MWh).

source.quote: Quotation: The contract price is in Euros and Euro cents per MWh
source.note: ICE Endex Product Specification Appendix A.13. Minimum Price Flux: 0.5 Euro Cent per MWh. Natural gas (H-Gas) at the Zeebrugge Trading Point managed by Fluxys Belgium S.A. and Huberator.

source.quote: The contract price is in Euros and Euro cents per MWh
source.note: Italian PSV Natural Gas Futures, ICE Endex. Unit of trading: 1 MW; minimum fluctuation: 0.5 Euro Cent per MWh (€0.005/MWh).
